name: Volt
description: Customer is asking about the Volt proposition — the combined benefits of having both Virgin Media and O2 services. This includes setting up or activating Volt, linking VM and O2 accounts, troubleshooting Volt benefits not working, or general enquiries about Volt eligibility and features.

sampleUtterances.utterance: I want to {voltAction} Volt
How do I {voltAction} Volt benefits?
I'm an O2 customer and I want to get Volt on my Virgin Media account
How do I link my Virgin Media account with my O2 plan?
I want to combine my O2 and Virgin Media services
I have both O2 and Virgin but I'm not sure if Volt is active
My Volt benefits aren't showing on my account
I've recently got Virgin Media and I have O2 — how do I get the Volt speed boost?
What do I get with Volt?
Am I eligible for Volt?
I've linked my accounts but the Volt benefits haven't kicked in
How do I unlock the Volt supercharge benefits?
I want to {voltAction} my O2 and Virgin Media accounts for Volt
Can I get Volt if I'm on pay as you go with O2?
My Volt speed boost isn't working
I signed up for Volt but nothing has changed
What broadband speeds do I get with Volt?
I'm a Virgin Media customer and I've just joined O2 — how do I get Volt?
Do I need to do anything to activate Volt or is it automatic?
My partner has O2 and I have Virgin Media — can we get Volt together?
Volt isn't giving me the extra speed I was promised
Volt
